svg.title: Docker network driver types
svg.desc: Five Docker network drivers: bridge, host, none, overlay, macvlan — showing which containers and traffic flows each supports.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Docker bridge network in detail')
sendPrompt('When should I use Docker host network mode?')
sendPrompt('What is Docker none network mode used for?')
sendPrompt('What is Docker overlay network and when to use it?')
sendPrompt('What is Docker macvlan network and when do you need it?')

svg.text: Internet / external traffic enters via published port (-p 8080:80)
